page: Amazon Web Services u7in-16tb.224xlarge is a memory-optimized server instance designed for large-scale workloads requiring massive memory footprints. Powered by the AWS Nitro hypervisor, this instance features dedicated Intel x86_64 processors running at a base clock speed of 1.9 GHz. The system delivers a total of 896 virtual CPUs across 448 physical cores, with hyperthreading enabled at 2.0 threads per core.

The primary differentiator of this instance is its memory capacity, providing 16384.0 GB of RAM, which translates to approximately 18.29 GB of memory per core. It does not include local storage or integrated GPUs. For connectivity and storage access, the instance is network and EBS optimized, delivering a baseline network bandwidth of 100 Gbps.

From a cost-efficiency perspective, the u7in-16tb.224xlarge represents an enterprise-class tier designed to consolidate massive in-memory databases and enterprise applications. While it lacks local storage, its high-speed EBS optimization and 100 Gbps network bandwidth mitigate data transfer bottlenecks. This profile is highly suited for large-scale SAP HANA deployments, massive in-memory databases, and heavy enterprise resource planning workloads.
description: Amazon Web Services u7in-16tb.224xlarge is a memory-optimized server instance designed for enterprise workloads requiring massive memory capacity. Powered by the AWS Nitro hypervisor, this instance features 896 vCPUs across 448 physical Intel x86_64 cores running at 1.9 GHz. It is equipped with 16384.0 GB of RAM, providing approximately 18.29 GB of memory per core. The instance includes no local storage or GPUs, relying instead on network and EBS optimization with a baseline network bandwidth of 100 Gbps. This hardware profile is engineered for large-scale in-memory databases, SAP HANA deployments, and heavy enterprise applications.

tagline: An enterprise-grade memory-optimized platform featuring sixteen terabytes of RAM and high-speed network connectivity for massive in-memory workloads.
bullet_points: 896 dedicated vCPUs powered by Intel x86_64 processors at 1.9 GHz
16384 GB of system memory for massive in-memory datasets
100 Gbps baseline network bandwidth with EBS optimization
Built on the AWS Nitro hypervisor for dedicated resource allocation
Designed for enterprise SAP HANA, in-memory databases, and ERP systems
